proposal.title: # Dissolve the community WG multisig per EP15
proposal.description:
# Dissolve the community WG multisig per EP15
This proposal reassigns ownership of the ENS community pod, making it a sub-pod of ENS ecosystem. This enacts EP15 (formerly numbered EP14), the vote to dissolve the ENS community working group, as described [here](https://github.com/ensdomains/governance-docs/blob/main/governance-proposals/ep15-dissolution-of-the-community-working-group.md) and [passed on Snapshot](https://snapshot.org/#/ens.eth/proposal/0xa64ec8b446e509cb4b75092c4a714897790b70e2711fc3d6afa969c250e7eb92).
